summary.en: Pressure-bearing components in electrolyzer systems (e.g., electrolytic cells, separators, and storage vessels) must satisfy the applicable federal, state, and local pressure-vessel and workplace-safety requirements for the installation. ASME BPVC Section VIII and the ASME U/UM stamp are consensus-standard certification routes administered by ASME and are widely required by state boiler and pressure-vessel laws, insurers, adopted codes, or AHJs, but the legal obligation comes from those laws, codes, and approvals rather than from the named ASME standard standing alone. OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 also incorporates ASME pressure-vessel requirements for covered hydrogen containers. Where an AHJ requires ASME-stamped vessels, the stamp must be issued through an ASME-authorized inspection agency (AIA).
summary.zh: 电解槽系统中的承压部件（如电解单元、气液分离器、储罐）须满足具体安装场景适用的联邦、州及地方压力容器和工作场所安全要求。ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇及 ASME U/UM 钢印是由 ASME 管理的共识标准认证路径，并被州锅炉及压力容器法规、保险机构、已采纳规范或 AHJ 广泛要求；但法律义务来源于这些法规、规范和批准，而不是 ASME 标准名称本身独立产生。OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 也对覆盖范围内的氢气容器纳入 ASME 压力容器要求。若 AHJ 要求 ASME 钢印容器，该钢印须通过 ASME 授权检验机构（AIA）签发。
summary.zht: 電解槽系統中的承壓部件（如電解單元、氣液分離器、儲罐）須滿足具體安裝場景適用的聯邦、州及地方壓力容器和工作場所安全要求。ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇及 ASME U/UM 鋼印是由 ASME 管理的共識標準認證路徑，並被州鍋爐及壓力容器法規、保險機構、已採納規範或 AHJ 廣泛要求；但法律義務來源於這些法規、規範和批准，而不是 ASME 標準名稱本身獨立產生。OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 也對覆蓋範圍內的氫氣容器納入 ASME 壓力容器要求。若 AHJ 要求 ASME 鋼印容器，該鋼印須通過 ASME 授權檢驗機構（AIA）簽發。

standards_or_laws: ASME BPVC Section VIII, Division 1 (Pressure Vessels)
ASME BPVC Section VIII, Division 2 (Alternative Rules)
ASME U / UM Stamp (Authorized Inspection Agency certification)

summary.en: China regulates pressure vessels under the TSG (Technical Supervision Guideline) regime administered by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation). The primary standard is GB 150 (Pressure Vessels), covering design, fabrication, inspection, and testing. Manufacturers must hold a special-equipment manufacturing license issued by a provincial-level market supervision authority. Inspection is carried out by SAMR-designated special-equipment inspection institutes. Chinese TSG certificates and GB 150 conformance are not recognized by US Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs).
summary.zh: 中国压力容器受国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）主管的TSG（特种设备安全技术规范）体系监管，主要标准为GB 150（压力容器），涵盖设计、制造、检验与试验。制造商须取得省级市场监管部门颁发的特种设备制造许可证，检验由SAMR指定的特种设备检验机构实施。中国TSG证书及GB 150合规声明不被美国管辖当局（AHJ）认可。
summary.zht: 中國壓力容器受國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）主管的TSG（特種設備安全技術規範）體系監管，主要標準為GB 150（壓力容器），涵蓋設計、製造、檢驗與試驗。製造商須取得省級市場監管部門頒發的特種設備製造許可證，檢驗由SAMR指定的特種設備檢驗機構實施。中國TSG證書及GB 150合規聲明不被美國管轄當局（AHJ）認可。

standards_or_laws: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Regulation for Pressure Vessels)

gap.en: This is a hard approval gate where the US installation jurisdiction requires ASME-stamped pressure vessels or otherwise accepts only ASME/AHJ-approved pressure equipment. Chinese manufacturers holding TSG licenses and GB 150 certification must separately pursue the pressure-vessel route accepted by the relevant US jurisdiction, often ASME accreditation, ASME BPVC documentation, and inspection by an ASME-authorized AIA. There is no automatic mutual recognition or equivalency pathway between TSG/GB 150 and US state/AHJ pressure-vessel approvals. This typically requires 6-18 months and significant engineering documentation work for first-time exporters.
gap.zh: 在美国安装辖区要求 ASME 钢印压力容器，或仅接受 ASME/AHJ 批准的压力设备时，这是一道硬性批准门槛。持有 TSG 许可证及 GB 150 证书的中国制造商，须另行完成相关美国辖区接受的压力容器路径，通常包括 ASME 认证、ASME BPVC 文件体系以及 ASME 授权 AIA 检验。TSG/GB 150 与美国州/AHJ 压力容器批准之间不存在自动互认或等效通道，首次出口商通常需耗时 6 至 18 个月并进行大量工程文件工作。
gap.zht: 在美國安裝轄區要求 ASME 鋼印壓力容器，或僅接受 ASME/AHJ 批准的壓力設備時，這是一道硬性批准門檻。持有 TSG 許可證及 GB 150 證書的中國製造商，須另行完成相關美國轄區接受的壓力容器路徑，通常包括 ASME 認證、ASME BPVC 文件體系以及 ASME 授權 AIA 檢驗。TSG/GB 150 與美國州／AHJ 壓力容器批准之間不存在自動互認或等效通道，首次出口商通常需耗時 6 至 18 個月並進行大量工程文件工作。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where applicable — OSHA hydrogen rules, state boiler and pressure-vessel laws, adopted codes, insurers, or AHJs may require ASME BPVC/U-stamped vessels. ASME BPVC itself is a consensus standard used through incorporation, adoption, or AHJ approval, not a standalone federal mandate for every electrolyzer vessel.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic sale and export under Chinese law, but not accepted in the US

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA), 29 CFR 1910.103

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-manufactured pressure vessels bearing only TSG/GB 150 certification are unlikely to be accepted for covered hydrogen installations in US jurisdictions that require ASME-stamped or AHJ-approved pressure equipment. Exporters should identify the governing state/local pressure-vessel law and AHJ requirement before shipment and obtain ASME BPVC Section VIII certification and U/UM stamping where that legal or AHJ pathway applies. This is a design, manufacturing, and inspection process change — not a paperwork re-label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有 TSG/GB 150 认证的中国制造压力容器，在要求 ASME 钢印或 AHJ 批准压力设备的美国辖区内，通常难以用于覆盖范围内的氢气安装。出口商应在出货前确认适用的州/地方压力容器法规及 AHJ 要求；如该法律或 AHJ 路径适用，则须取得 ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇认证及 U/UM 钢印。这是一项设计、制造及检验流程的实质性变更，而非单纯的文件重新标注。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有 TSG/GB 150 認證的中國製造壓力容器，在要求 ASME 鋼印或 AHJ 批准壓力設備的美國轄區內，通常難以用於覆蓋範圍內的氫氣安裝。出口商應在出貨前確認適用的州／地方壓力容器法規及 AHJ 要求；如該法律或 AHJ 路徑適用，則須取得 ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇認證及 U/UM 鋼印。這是一項設計、製造及檢驗流程的實質性變更，而非單純的文件重新標註。

requirement_topic.en: Hydrogen Safety: Installation, Ventilation, and Gas Detection
requirement_topic.zh: 氢气安全：安装、通风与气体检测
requirement_topic.zht: 氫氣安全：安裝、通風與氣體偵測

summary.en: Hydrogen installation safety in the US is governed by mandatory OSHA requirements, adopted state/local fire and building codes, the NEC where adopted, and AHJ permits/approvals. NFPA 2 (Hydrogen Technologies Code), NFPA 55 (Compressed Gases and Cryogenic Fluids Code), and NFPA 70 (NEC) are consensus codes; they are mandatory only where incorporated by OSHA, adopted by state/local law, required by an AHJ, or imposed by contract/insurance. They govern technical issues such as site selection, separation distances, ventilation, leak detection, emergency shutoff, signage, and classified-location electrical equipment when adopted. Electrical equipment in hydrogen-classified areas must satisfy the legal installation requirements and AHJ approval; NRTL listing by UL, CSA, Intertek, or another OSHA-recognised laboratory is a common way to satisfy OSHA/NEC approval requirements.
summary.zh: 美国氢气安装安全由 OSHA 强制要求、州/地方已采纳的消防和建筑规范、已采纳的 NEC 以及 AHJ 许可/批准管辖。NFPA 2《氢气技术规范》、NFPA 55《压缩气体与低温流体规范》和 NFPA 70（NEC）属于共识规范；只有在被 OSHA 纳入、被州/地方法律采纳、被 AHJ 要求或被合同/保险要求时，才成为强制要求。被采纳时，这些规范管理选址、安全间距、通风、泄漏检测、紧急切断、标识及分类场所电气设备等技术事项。氢气分类区域内的电气设备须满足法定安装要求和 AHJ 批准；由 UL、CSA、Intertek 或其他 OSHA 认可实验室进行 NRTL 列名，是满足 OSHA/NEC 批准要求的常见路径。
summary.zht: 美國氫氣安裝安全由 OSHA 強制要求、州／地方已採納的消防和建築規範、已採納的 NEC 以及 AHJ 許可／批准管轄。NFPA 2《氫氣技術規範》、NFPA 55《壓縮氣體與低溫流體規範》和 NFPA 70（NEC）屬於共識規範；只有在被 OSHA 納入、被州／地方法律採納、被 AHJ 要求或被合同／保險要求時，才成為強制要求。被採納時，這些規範管理選址、安全間距、通風、洩漏偵測、緊急切斷、標識及分類場所電氣設備等技術事項。氫氣分類區域內的電氣設備須滿足法定安裝要求和 AHJ 批准；由 UL、CSA、Intertek 或其他 OSHA 認可實驗室進行 NRTL 列名，是滿足 OSHA／NEC 批准要求的常見路徑。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 55:2023 (Compressed Gases and Cryogenic Fluids Code)
NRTL listing (UL, CSA, Intertek, or equivalent)

summary.en: China regulates hydrogen safety for electrolyzers primarily through GB/T 29729 (Safety Requirements for Hydrogen Systems), GB 50516 (Code for Design of Hydrogen Fueling Stations, referenced for production-side safety), and GB 4962 (Safe Use of Hydrogen). The Ministry of Emergency Management (MEM) oversees hazardous chemical safety; hydrogen is classified as a hazardous chemical under the Regulations on Safety Management of Hazardous Chemicals. Electrical equipment in explosive atmospheres must comply with the GB 3836 series. Chinese standards do not include an NRTL-equivalent listing requirement recognized in the US; Chinese CCC certification for electrical equipment is not accepted by US AHJs.
summary.zh: 中国电解槽氢气安全主要受GB/T 29729（氢系统安全要求）、GB 50516（加氢站设计规范，生产侧安全参考）及GB 4962（氢气使用安全技术规程）监管。应急管理部（MEM）负责危险化学品安全监管，氢气依《危险化学品安全管理条例》被列为危险化学品。爆炸性环境中的电气设备须符合GB 3836系列标准。中国标准不包含被美国认可的NRTL等效认证要求；电气设备的中国CCC认证不被美国管辖当局接受。
summary.zht: 中國電解槽氫氣安全主要受GB/T 29729（氫系統安全要求）、GB 50516（加氫站設計規範，生產側安全參考）及GB 4962（氫氣使用安全技術規程）監管。應急管理部（MEM）負責危險化學品安全監管，氫氣依《危險化學品安全管理條例》被列為危險化學品。爆炸性環境中的電氣設備須符合GB 3836系列標準。中國標準不包含被美國認可的NRTL等效認證要求；電氣設備的中國CCC認證不被美國管轄當局接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 50516-2010 (Code for Design of Hydrogen Fueling Stations, amended 2021)
GB 3836 series (Electrical Equipment for Explosive Atmospheres)
Regulations on Safety Management of Hazardous Chemicals (State Council Order No. 591)

gap.en: NFPA 2 and NFPA 55 have no automatic mutual-recognition pathway to Chinese GB standards. Where adopted by the installation jurisdiction or required by the AHJ, their technical requirements can be a US-specific approval gate. NRTL listing for electrical components (hazardous-location equipment, power electronics, controls) is likewise required only through the applicable OSHA/adopted-code/AHJ approval framework; Chinese CCC, CE, or CB certificates are not accepted as direct substitutes by US AHJs or insurers. Exporters should submit representative electrical components to a USDOL-recognized NRTL where listing is needed. NFPA 2 may also require separation distances, ventilation rates, and detection settings that go beyond GB/T 29729. OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 adds federal workplace safety requirements independent of local code adoption.
gap.zh: NFPA 2 和 NFPA 55 与中国 GB 标准之间不存在自动互认路径。若被安装辖区采纳或被 AHJ 要求，其技术要求可能成为美国特有的批准门槛。电气元件（危险场所设备、电力电子、控制器）的 NRTL 列名，同样只有在适用的 OSHA/已采纳规范/AHJ 批准框架下才属于要求；中国 CCC、欧盟 CE 或 CB 证书不被美国 AHJ 或保险机构接受为直接替代。需要列名时，出口商应将代表性电气元件提交美国劳工部认可的 NRTL。NFPA 2 还可能要求超出 GB/T 29729 的安全间距、通风量和检测设定值。OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 另设独立于地方规范采纳的联邦工作场所安全要求。
gap.zht: NFPA 2 和 NFPA 55 與中國 GB 標準之間不存在自動互認路徑。若被安裝轄區採納或被 AHJ 要求，其技術要求可能成為美國特有的批准門檻。電氣元件（危險場所設備、電力電子、控制器）的 NRTL 列名，同樣只有在適用的 OSHA／已採納規範／AHJ 批准框架下才屬於要求；中國 CCC、歐盟 CE 或 CB 證書不被美國 AHJ 或保險機構接受為直接替代。需要列名時，出口商應將代表性電氣元件提交美國勞工部認可的 NRTL。NFPA 2 還可能要求超出 GB/T 29729 的安全間距、通風量和偵測設定值。OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 另設獨立於地方規範採納的聯邦工作場所安全要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligations — OSHA 29 CFR 1910.103 and adopted state/local fire, building, electrical, and workplace-safety rules govern covered installations. NFPA 2, NFPA 55, NFPA 70/NEC, and NRTL listing are mandatory only where incorporated, adopted, required by the AHJ, or otherwise needed to satisfy the legal approval framework.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic installations; GB standards and CCC certification not recognized in the US

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese electrolyzer manufacturers exporting to the US should treat hydrogen safety as a legal/AHJ approval exercise, not as a standalone mandate to use a named NFPA or UL standard in every case. Covered installations must satisfy OSHA hydrogen rules, adopted fire/electrical codes, AHJ permits, and NRTL listing or equivalent approval where required for electrical equipment in hydrogen-classified areas. Chinese TSG/GB 150 pressure certification and Chinese CCC electrical certification do not by themselves satisfy these US approval requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向美国出口的中国电解槽制造商，应将氢气安全视为法律/AHJ 批准问题，而不是在所有情形下一概强制采用某个具名 NFPA 或 UL 标准。覆盖范围内的安装须满足 OSHA 氢气规则、已采纳的消防/电气规范、AHJ 许可，以及氢气分类区域电气设备在被要求时的 NRTL 列名或等效批准。中国 TSG/GB 150 压力认证及中国 CCC 电气认证本身并不能满足上述美国批准要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向美國出口的中國電解槽製造商，應將氫氣安全視為法律／AHJ 批准問題，而不是在所有情形下一概強制採用某個具名 NFPA 或 UL 標準。覆蓋範圍內的安裝須滿足 OSHA 氫氣規則、已採納的消防／電氣規範、AHJ 許可，以及氫氣分類區域電氣設備在被要求時的 NRTL 列名或等效批准。中國 TSG/GB 150 壓力認證及中國 CCC 電氣認證本身並不能滿足上述美國批准要求。
